content.problemStatement:
MoEngage has given you an array AAA consisting of NNN positive integers.

You should perform QQQ queries of the following two types:


111 iii XXX : Set AiA_iAi​ to XXX.
222 LLL RRR : Find the **minimum** non-negative integer KKK such that the sequence [∣AL−K∣,∣AL+1−K∣,…,∣AR−1−K∣,∣AR−K∣][|A_L - K|, |A_{L+1} - K|, \ldots, |A_{R-1} - K|, |A_R - K|][∣AL​−K∣,∣AL+1​−K∣,…,∣AR−1​−K∣,∣AR​−K∣] is sorted in **non-decreasing** order. Print −1-1−1 if no such KKK exists.
For each query of type 222, output the **minimum** non-negative integer KKK satisfying the constraint, or −1-1−1 if there isn't any.


Input Format

The first line contains two integers N,QN, QN,Q.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
Then, the ithi^{th}ith of the next QQQ lines contains three integers describing the queries 111 iii XXX or 222 LLL RRR.


Output Format
For each query of type 222, output the **minimum** integer KKK satisfying the constraint, or −1-1−1 if there isn't any in a new line.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
In the first query, selecting K=4K=4K=4 makes the sequence [∣A1−K∣,∣A2−K∣,∣A3−K∣,∣A4−K∣,∣A5−K∣]=[1,1,2,2,4][|A_1 - K|, |A_2 - K|, |A_3 - K|, |A_4 - K|, |A_5 - K|] = [1, 1, 2, 2, 4][∣A1​−K∣,∣A2​−K∣,∣A3​−K∣,∣A4​−K∣,∣A5​−K∣]=[1,1,2,2,4]. This sequence is sorted in non-decreasing order. Also, there exists no value of KKK less than 444 satisfying this.


In the second query, change A2=7A_2 = 7A2​=7. After the second query, the array AAA becomes [5,7,2,6,0][5, 7, 2, 6, 0][5,7,2,6,0].


In the third query, there exists no value of KKK satisfying the constraints.
